channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Aave faces a potential $230M bad debt from Kelp DAO fallout—and the split hinges on Kelp’s choice. 🚨 https://Blockchain.News/news/aave-proposes-two-paths-kelp-dao-hack-bad-debt #DeFi #Aave #KelpDAO
